persona.description: A first-time buyer considering a higher-stakes purchase and needing reassurance.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 5-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required
Scene: a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter; visible product setup: two premium wristwatches on neutral display pads.
Continuity: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter.
Visible intervention: no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention
Reaction timeline:
- 0-1s: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter. no salesperson appears, no staff enters, and no one speaks; the shopper remains alone with the product and decides what to do without intervention.
- 1-2s: customer remains alone near the display with a light, noncommittal browsing posture.
- 2-4s: gaze briefly scans product and surrounding area without seeking staff. hands remain relaxed with minimal product contact and no request gesture.
- 4-5s: slow casual movement along the display, with no staff approaching.
Negative constraints: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no scene change, no new shoppers, no costume change, no product swap, no inconsistent reaction, no enum-like text, no floating labels, no UI overlays
